docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY DAVIS, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT MUTTVILLE  A 501 (C) (3) NON-PROFIT ORGANIZATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
